arts.ttl: Chelsea’s easy win can’t hide deeper issues that threaten the fabric of modern football
arts.sum: Chelsea 4-0 Southampton: The Blues cruised to victory over the hapless Saints but there are wider issues being played out at Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: What Christopher Nkunku did to Cole Palmer says it all as one Chelsea star fires pointed message
arts.sum: Not for the first time in recent weeks, Nkunku was left to glare at Cole Palmer. Palmer, in search of a goal to end his own personal drought, had been left with Nkunku at Villa Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Nico Williams to Arsenal in DANGER as Chelsea target Aaron Ramsdale: FootballTransfers recap
arts.sum: Nico Williams to Arsenal in DANGER as Chelsea target Aaron Ramsdale: FootballTransfers recap Tuesday 25 February saw Arsenal face danger in their pursuit of Nico Williams and Chelsea rekindle their interest in Aaron Ramsdale.

arts.ttl: Chelsea have new coach to thank for 4-0 win over Southampton as Blues solve major problem at Stamford Bridge - opinion
arts.sum: His impact is already on show!

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer problem remains but Chelsea get fans back onside with Southampton thrashing
arts.sum: CHELSEA 4-0 SOUTHAMPTON: The struggling Saints were happy enough to roll over at Stamford Bridge to get the Blues back in the Champions League places after a miserable run of form

arts.ttl: Chelsea back to winning ways as Southampton’s sorry season continues
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku, Pedro Neto, Levi Colwill and Marc Cucurella scored in a 4-0 victory.

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer handed Kris Boyd 'back to basics' pep talk as struggling Chelsea star's flaws dissected live on air
arts.sum: The former Rangers striker and Paul Merson pinpointed the key reason behind his recent struggles

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues to submit SHOCK swap deal bid for Loic Bade
arts.sum: Chelsea will offer David Datro Fofana, Aaron Anselmino and €30 million to sign Sevilla defender Loic Bade this summer, according to a shock report. He is seen as a future prospect by the hierarchy in west London, however El Nacional claim that Chelsea are already willing to offload him this summer as they look to win the race for Bade’s signature.

arts.ttl: Ashley Cole earns wildcard Rangers next manager shout as Joe Cole goes public to back Chelsea legend
arts.sum: The ex England international spoke out after Philippe Clement was sacked on Monday

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea transfer hinges on Champions League qualification
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will only be able to sign Chelsea loanee Carney Chukwuemeka permanently if they secure a Champions League spot, according to reports from Germany. The Bundesliga club brought Chukwuemeka in during the January transfer window, rescuing the young midfielder from a frustrating spell at Stamford Bridge.
